positive: A minimalistic, stylized depiction of a cosmic wanderer: a stylized human silhouette gently floating among nebula dust clouds and distant, glowing constellations. The figure is depicted in a pose of calm contemplation, arms open, embraced by the cosmos. Use a highly contrasting deep indigo and vibrant cyan palette, accented by pops of electric violet and gold. The overall style should be retro-futuristic pop art, with clean, bold lines and saturated, flat colors reminiscent of 1980s science fiction album covers. Focus on strong, central symmetry and a clean silhouette that works well when printed on a garment. The background nebula must be abstract and smooth, avoiding excessive texture or chaotic elements. Clean linework, high contrast, sticker art aesthetic.
